title: Snowy Weather
description: In all biomes of the world, the earth is covered with snow, and the water freezes!
body:
### **Snowy Weather** - Now it will snow instead of rain in all biomes, even in the desert!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Xcl5llfqGwU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A cold winter has overtaken the world, which covers the whole world with snow and cold, even in hot biomes. Water freezes everywhere and snow appears. You can only escape in caves or other dimensions.

**When it starts to rain or thunderstorm, it will always snow! The temperature in all biomes is below 0!**

Each new generated chunk will be frozen. If your chunks were uploaded before you installed the datapack, then the snowy weather will also happen and everything will gradually freeze.

❗_If, after adding a datapack/mod to your world or server, you want to delete it, then the biomes will return to their original state, but the fallen snow and ice will remain on the meset!_

---
**For those who like a lot of snow:**

Can you activate the function ```unlimited_snow_accumulation_height``` which removes the accumulated snow limit. That is, when the snow layer reaches a maximum value of 8, it is automatically replaced by a block of snow. Applies to players within a radius of 8 blocks in all directions.

_**❗ Attention! The function may affect the performance of your world or server.**_

- Enter command to enable function: ```/function snowy_weather:unlimited_snow_accumulation_height```
- Enter command to disable function: ```/schedule clear snowy_weather:unlimited_snow_accumulation_height```
